header.title: 💬 Message Board (Collaborate)
header.subtitle: The message board shows all family trees you have access to, your own trees and the trees shared with you. Per family tree you see discussions about specific persons, ordered by person ID.

access.heading: No access to collaborate
access.body: The collaboration feature is available for Viewers, Editors and Owners who have been invited by the family tree owner.

modal.title: ➕ Start new discussion
modal.fillBoth: Please fill in both the person ID and name.
modal.notFound: Family tree not found. Refresh the page.

subtitle.none: No active family tree — read-only access.

tree.noAccess: No accessible family trees found. Ask an owner to invite you, or

noDiscussions.active: No discussions yet. Start one using the search bar above.
noDiscussions.inactive: No discussions in this family tree yet.

tree.membersOnly: Only you have access to this family tree.
tree.inactiveBannerSuffix: to start new discussions or reply.

search.label: Add a person to the discussion:

message.empty: No messages in this discussion yet.
message.readonly: 🔒 Activate this family tree to reply.

diff.label: Describe the proposed change:
diff.placeholder: e.g. Date of birth was 1923, not 1932…

error.auth: AuthModule not loaded. Check the load order.
error.share: ShareModule not loaded. Check the load order.
